meta.name: Opera of Ruin (FF6)
meta.source: Inspired by Final Fantasy VI: opera house drama, Magitek steel, Esper light, and the World of Ruin
meta.tokenConvention: Every color key maps to a CSS custom property named --<key>. e.g. "accent" -> var(--accent). The group names (surfaces, lines, text, accents, crystals, states) are for human organization only and are NOT part of the variable name. The four crystal-* tokens are extra identity colors; wire them up where supported.
meta.notExportedYet: Non-color tokens still live only in styles.css and are intentionally omitted here: --radius, --radius-s, --shadow. For stronger FF6 flavor, add subtle stage-curtain gradients, faint machinery scanlines, and localized Esper bloom effects when non-color tokens are supported.

bg.desc: World of Ruin charcoal with a velvet undertone

bg-soft.desc: Shadowed stage wing behind primary content

panel-2.desc: Raised surface with imperial wine depth

panel-3.desc: Highest elevation with dramatic theater contrast

line.desc: Pale moon-rose frame line for ornate structure

line-soft.desc: Muted plum divider for internal rhythm

text.desc: High-clarity ivory for readable dramatic contrast

muted.desc: Secondary labels in faded stage-light pink

accent.desc: Esper cyan for primary interactive energy

gold.desc: Imperial gilt for totals and key headings

crystal-earth.desc: Earth analog - reclaimed life in Ruin

danger.desc: Crisis red for destructive and critical actions
